title: Auto-Parts Growth Story Still Adds Up

title: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) Q1 Earnings and Revenues Surpass Estimates
text: O'Reilly Automotive (ORLY) came out with quarterly earnings of $8.28 per share, beating the Zacks Consensus Estimate of $8 per share. This compares to earnings of $7.17 per share a year ago.

title: O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. Reports First Quarter 2023 Results
text: SPRINGFIELD, Mo., April 26, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. (the “Company” or “O'Reilly”) ( Nasdaq: ORLY), a leading retailer in the automotive aftermarket industry, today announced record revenue and earnings for its first quarter ended March 31, 2023.

title: O'Reilly (ORLY) to Report Q1 Earnings: Here's What to Expect
text: The Zacks Consensus Estimate for O'Reilly's (ORLY) Q1 earnings and revenues is pegged at $7.99 per share and $3.56 billion, respectively.

title: 7 Stocks That Hedge Funds Are Dumping Now
text: While it's always important to conduct your own due diligence in the equities arena, there's great value in understanding which hedge fund stocks to avoid. Put another way, these are the stocks that hedge funds are unloading, which should inspire additional research.

title: Growth Stocks Easy To Find With This Powerful Screen

title: O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. Announces Dates for its First Quarter 2023 Earnings Release and Conference Call
text: SPRINGFIELD, Mo., April 03, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- O'Reilly Automotive, Inc. (the “Company” or “O'Reilly”) (Nasdaq: ORLY), a leading retailer in the automotive aftermarket industry, announces the release date for its first quarter 2023 results as Wednesday, April 26, 2023, with a conference call to follow on Thursday, April 27, 2023.
